crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox, inspect content approvals and draft pipeline health, write memory, then continue the highest priority social-media-agent task. When finished, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 4h

crons.name: daily-content-brief
crons.prompt: Create a task for the daily content brief, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/content-research/SKILL.md. Capture configured signals, write content/signals/YYYY-MM-DD.json and content/angles/YYYY-MM-DD.md, update heartbeat/events/memory, and complete or block the task. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire daily-content-brief --interval "0 9 * * 1-5"

crons.name: draft-pipeline-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for draft pipeline review, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/draft-production/SKILL.md and .claude/skills/approval-routing/SKILL.md. Review angles, stale drafts, approval state, and scheduled handoffs. Do not publish or schedule without an approval. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire draft-pipeline-review --interval "0 13 * * 1-5"

crons.name: analytics-digest
crons.prompt: Create a task for analytics digest, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/analytics-digest/SKILL.md. Read configured analytics exports or dashboards, write content/analytics/weekly/YYYY-MM-DD.json and .md summaries, update MEMORY.md with durable learnings, and create human tasks for missing analytics access. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire analytics-digest --interval "0 17 * * 5"

crons.name: weekly-retro
crons.prompt: Create a task for weekly content retro, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/weekly-retro/SKILL.md. Review signals, drafts, approvals, published records, and analytics from the previous week; write content/retros/YYYY-MM-DD.md and update goals/tuning suggestions. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-retro --interval "0 10 * * 1"
